privacy.title: Privacy First
privacy.description: Your data stays private. We don't store your CV or personal information.

what.a: CV optimisation means tailoring your CV to match specific job requirements, using the exact keywords and phrases employers are looking for.

ats.a: ATS (Applicant Tracking System) is software that many companies use to filter CVs before they reach human recruiters. Our optimisation ensures your CV passes these filters.

guarantee.q: Is the 85% ATS pass rate really guaranteed?
guarantee.a: Yes! If your optimised CV doesn't pass ATS filters, we'll refund your payment. We stand behind our AI technology.

privacy.a: Absolutely. We don't store your CV, personal information, or job descriptions. Everything is processed in real-time and immediately discarded.
